title: TFC Punishment for Death
description: Amplify Terrafirmacraft (TFC) survival with death penalties. Retain hunger/saturation on respawn, apply TFC-specific debuffs, and customize body cooldowns for unforgiving gameplay.
body:
Made for the [TerraFirmaGreg ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/terrafirmagreg) modpack

**TFC Punishment for Death** - is a Terrafirmacraft-focused mod that amplifies the stakes of survival by introducing harsh, TFC-integrated penalties for dying. Designed to complement TFC’s realism, it adds configurable debuffs, health/hunger adjustments, and optional Corpse Mod compatibility for body cooldowns.

**Key Features**

TFC-Centric Death Mechanics:

Seamlessly integrates with TFC’s hunger, thirst, and exhaustion systems.

Apply debuffs like Thirst, Exhaustion, and Pinned (native TFC effects) on respawn.

Adjust post-death health, food, and thirst levels to match TFC’s survival challenges.

Optional Corpse Mod Support:

Enable cooldowns for body looting (requires Corpse Mod).

Prevent instant item recovery for added difficulty.

Customizable Penalties:

Fine-tune debuff durations (blindness, slowness, nausea) and amplifier levels.

Choose between TFC’s default behavior or manual overrides for health/hunger.

**Who Is This Mod For?**

TFC Players: Deepen TFC’s unforgiving survival loop with permanent consequences.

Hardcore Survivalists: Turn every death into a strategic setback.

Modpack Creators: Balance TFC gameplay with config-driven penalties.

Requirements & Setup

Mandatory: Terrafirmacraft (TFC).

Optional: Corpse Mod (for corpse cooldowns).

Configure settings via tfcpunishment-common.toml or in-game menu (Esc → Mods → TFC Punishment for Death → Config).

TFC Punishment for Death forces you to respect TFC’s realism—no second chances, only survival.


Localization: English/Russian
